creator: bjn@visi.com
text:
cddbd is the Internet CD Database server software--supports
	things like xmcd (another FreeBSD port).

	Already compiled with no mods under FreeBSD; this just provides
	a ports wrapper that complies with FreeBSD installation standards.

Fix: 

Please commit incoming/cddbd.tar.gz
	Thanks!
